allow: Bash(sed -i 's/.*<WallpaperBackground \\/>//g' SignInScreen.js SignUpScreen.js ProfileScreen.js OrdersScreen.js DashboardScreen.js PaymentScreen.js BagDetailScreen.js SearchScreen.js ConfirmationScreen.js ContactScreen.js RestaurantOrdersScreen.js MapScreen.js)

Bash(sed -i "s/root: { flex: 1 },/root: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: T.bg },/g" SignInScreen.js SignUpScreen.js ProfileScreen.js OrdersScreen.js DashboardScreen.js PaymentScreen.js BagDetailScreen.js SearchScreen.js ConfirmationScreen.js ContactScreen.js RestaurantOrdersScreen.js)
Bash(sed -i "s/root: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: \\"#FFFFFF\\" }/root: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: T.bg }/g" SignInScreen.js SignUpScreen.js ProfileScreen.js OrdersScreen.js)
